title: Preparation of BG-11 liquid media
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fsf26","text":"This is for making liquid media of BG-11.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Take the medium in powdered form and mix it with doubly distilled water to just 1/10 th of the total volume.
Add a common stock of micronutrients made in ddH2O and mix well.
Make up the volume to the total and mixed well.

Adjust the pH on a calibrated pH meter using 1N HCl and /or 1N NaOH. The media was mixed using a magnetic stirrer continuously to homogenize the pH and to prevent precipitation of certain constituents.
creator: Ashwinuday
